creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit in branch main references this bug:

URL: https://cgit.FreeBSD.org/ports/commit/?id=e288521309103ab2b95286ea18c0f9dfd0fbd42c

commit e288521309103ab2b95286ea18c0f9dfd0fbd42c
Author:     Olivier Duchateau <duchateau.olivier@gmail.com>
AuthorDate: 2023-08-14 11:43:46 +0000
Commit:     Fernando Apesteguía <fernape@FreeBSD.org>
CommitDate: 2023-08-15 11:44:10 +0000

    multimedia/elementary-videos: update to 3.0.0

    ChangeLog: https://github.com/elementary/videos/releases/tag/3.0.0

     * Use playbin with the gst gtk widget for playback
     * Separate headerbars with deck pages
     * PlaylistItem: Some gtk4 preparations
     * Playlist: Preparations for GTK4
     * PlaylistPopover: send app notification when adding
     * LibraryItem: Simplifications and preparations for GTK4
     * LibraryPage: Preparations for GTK4
     * EpisodesPage: Preparations for GTK4
     * README: build with Flatpak
     * BottomBar and PlayerPage: GTK4 preparations
     * SettingsPopover: Preparations for GTK4
     * Window: put everything in a windowhandle
     * PlaybackManager: Improve position querying
     * Window: Some GTK4 preparations
     * PreviewPopover: Preparations for GTK4
     * Remove unused Clutter
     * Meson: use gnome.post_install to compile schemas
     * Metainfo: 3.0.0 release notes
     * Update screenshots
     * Meson: update to 3.0.0

    PR:             273075
    Reported by:    duchateau.olivier@gmail.com
    Reviewed by:

 multimedia/elementary-videos/Makefile                          |  2 +-
 multimedia/elementary-videos/distinfo                          |  6 +++---
